title: lithocardium longifolium
side_effects: Lithocardium longifolium can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing excessive sedation, nausea, and stomach discomfort due to its high alkaloid content. Prolonged consumption of the plant may also lead to cardiovascular issues, including decreased heart rate and blood pressure fluctuations. In severe cases, improper use of lithocardium longifolium can cause respiratory problems, such as shortness of breath and bronchial constriction. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these adverse effects.
